name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: VNC Activity from a Remote Host
notes: This Building Block identifies flows where a VNC service is being accessed from a remote host.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: VNC Activity from a Remote Host on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Remote to Local
when the flow matches Application is RemoteAccess.VNC
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: VNC Activity from a Remote Host on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Remote to Local
AND when the flow matches Application is RemoteAccess.VNC
